name: Redpanda (Kafka Compatible)
description: High-performance streaming engine compatible with Kafka API. Includes Redpanda Console for visual management of topics, consumers and messages.

variables.label: Kafka API Port
variables.description: Port to connect your applications to the Kafka-compatible broker.

variables.label: Console UI Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the Redpanda Console Web UI.
